artifacts.summary: Implementation summary documenting completed phases (1-3) and blocked phases (4-6) with detailed analysis of fundamental blockers

verification.note: No new sorries or axioms introduced. Task blocked on fundamental mathematical issues, not code errors.

review_reason: Phase 4 blocked - the BFMCS construction sorries cannot be filled due to fundamental limitations: (1) F-formulas do not persist through Lindenbaum extensions in linear chains, (2) FlagBFMCS satisfies_at to truth_at bridge requires proving convexity of shifted domains which fails, (3) CanonicalMCS lacks AddCommGroup/LinearOrder typeclasses. These are mathematical blockers, not implementation gaps.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phases 1-3 completed: archived TranslationGroup, verified Cantor infrastructure, identified three fundamental blockers preventing satisfies_at to truth_at conversion. Phases 4-6 blocked. Updated DenseCompleteness.lean documentation with detailed blocker analysis.
